absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: check .sz.yaml, .sz/registry.json, bus, memory, and installed modules
summarize protocol readiness without calling external services
emit concrete remediation hints for missing runtime pieces
public_purpose: Audits the local System Zero installation and reconstructed stack readiness.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: An autonomous AI operating system. One system. Full solution.
